sections.paragraph:
ἐμμέσῳ some edd. Rv 1:13; 2:1; 4:6; 5:6; 6:6; 22:2 for ἐν μέσῳ (s. B-D-F §19).—M-M.

edd. edd. = editions, editors

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 323
